response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple domains and technologies, but his primary expertise lies in JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and web/mobile applications rather than C++ or Rust, which are core requirements for this role. His experience with geospatial data is limited to personal projects and does not demonstrate deep expertise in routing data pipelines or navigation systems. While his problem-solving and system design skills are strong, the mismatch in core technologies and domain experience significantly impacts his fit for this specific role.
strengths: Strong problem-solving and experimentation-driven approach to software development
Experience with distributed systems and high-performance applications (e.g., low-latency services at Dunnhumby)
Proven ability to build and maintain complex systems (e.g., geospatial platforms, real-time services)
concerns: Limited or no demonstrated experience with C++ or Rust, the primary languages for this role
Minimal direct experience with routing data pipelines, geospatial data processing, or navigation systems
Most recent experience is in full-stack web development (TypeScript/Node.js), which may not align with lower-level system work required
